metadata.title: Product Bricks & Capabilities
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the arrive domain.

bricks.name: Parking Configuration & Policy Management
bricks.description: Configures parking zones, tariffs, permits, exemptions, dwell rules, and city or operator policies across assets and channels.

internalModules.title: Rules and Configuration Model
internalModules.description: Defines the configurable policies, thresholds, and business rules for Parking Configuration & Policy Management.

internalModules.title: Decision Evaluation Engine
internalModules.description: Executes policy and pricing decisions in real time within Parking Configuration & Policy Management.

internalModules.title: Simulation and Override Controls
internalModules.description: Supports testing, exceptions, and operator overrides for Parking Configuration & Policy Management.

interfaces.title: Decision API
interfaces.description: API that returns policy, quote, or eligibility outcomes calculated by Parking Configuration & Policy Management.

interfaces.title: Configuration Workspace
interfaces.description: Operational interface for managing rules, policies, and overrides in Parking Configuration & Policy Management.

interfaces.title: Policy Change Events
interfaces.description: Event stream that communicates policy updates and decision outcomes from Parking Configuration & Policy Management.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Reservations & Permit Inventory to provide operations capabilities required by Parking Configuration & Policy Management.
Depends on Operator Analytics & Control Tower to provide analytics capabilities required by Parking Configuration & Policy Management.
Depends on Device & Validator Management to provide service capabilities required by Parking Configuration & Policy Management.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Parking Configuration & Policy Management synchronizes rules, policies, or decision parameters with external policy systems.
Parking Configuration & Policy Management may call regulatory or compliance services to validate decisions and exceptions.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Execution flows depend on Parking Configuration & Policy Management to evaluate rules, policies, eligibility, or pricing outcomes.
Governance and admin tooling depend on Parking Configuration & Policy Management to maintain controlled rule and policy changes.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Parking Configuration Policy.
Reads Payment Channel Orchestration to support domain workflows.
Reads Reservations Permit Inventory to support domain workflows.

bricks.name: Dynamic Pricing & Occupancy Optimization
bricks.description: Adjusts pricing and occupancy strategy using demand, event, and utilization signals.

internalModules.title: Rules and Configuration Model
internalModules.description: Defines the configurable policies, thresholds, and business rules for Dynamic Pricing & Occupancy Optimization.

internalModules.title: Decision Evaluation Engine
internalModules.description: Executes policy and pricing decisions in real time within Dynamic Pricing & Occupancy Optimization.

internalModules.title: Simulation and Override Controls

interfaces.title: Decision API

interfaces.title: Configuration Workspace
interfaces.description: Operational interface for managing rules, policies, and overrides in Dynamic Pricing & Occupancy Optimization.

interfaces.title: Policy Change Events
interfaces.description: Event stream that communicates policy updates and decision outcomes from Dynamic Pricing & Occupancy Optimization.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Reservations & Permit Inventory to provide operations capabilities required by Dynamic Pricing & Occupancy Optimization.
Depends on Operator Analytics & Control Tower to provide analytics capabilities required by Dynamic Pricing & Occupancy Optimization.
Depends on Device & Validator Management to provide service capabilities required by Dynamic Pricing & Occupancy Optimization.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Dynamic Pricing & Occupancy Optimization synchronizes rules, policies, or decision parameters with external policy systems.
Dynamic Pricing & Occupancy Optimization may call regulatory or compliance services to validate decisions and exceptions.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Execution flows depend on Dynamic Pricing & Occupancy Optimization to evaluate rules, policies, eligibility, or pricing outcomes.
Governance and admin tooling depend on Dynamic Pricing & Occupancy Optimization to maintain controlled rule and policy changes.

dataDependencies.description: Acts as the primary owning brick for Dynamic Pricing Occupancy Optimization.

bricks.name: Payment Channel Orchestration
bricks.description: Coordinates mobile, kiosk, in-car, partner, permit, and other payment channels through one governed payment-control layer.

internalModules.title: Transaction and Ledger Core
internalModules.description: Records the core financial or commercial transactions handled by Payment Channel Orchestration.

internalModules.title: Settlement and Reconciliation
internalModules.description: Matches external outcomes, balances, and exceptions flowing through Payment Channel Orchestration.

internalModules.title: Billing Rules and Controls
internalModules.description: Applies pricing, billing, tax, or financial control logic inside Payment Channel Orchestration.

interfaces.title: Transaction API
interfaces.description: API surface for submitting or retrieving financial transactions handled by Payment Channel Orchestration.

interfaces.title: Finance Operations Workspace
interfaces.description: User interface for reconciliation, exception handling, and financial oversight in Payment Channel Orchestration.

interfaces.title: Settlement and Ledger Events
interfaces.description: Event stream carrying posting, settlement, and status changes from Payment Channel Orchestration.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Reservations & Permit Inventory to provide operations capabilities required by Payment Channel Orchestration.
Depends on Access, Permit & LPR Control to provide identity capabilities required by Payment Channel Orchestration.
Depends on Partner API, Sandbox & Certification to provide integration capabilities required by Payment Channel Orchestration.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Payment Channel Orchestration depends on external payment or banking networks to authorize and settle transactions.
Payment Channel Orchestration exchanges postings, reconciliations, or settlement outcomes with finance back-office systems.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Commercial flows depend on Payment Channel Orchestration to authorize, post, reconcile, or settle financial transactions.
Back-office finance consumers depend on Payment Channel Orchestration for accounting, settlement, and reconciliation outputs.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Payment Instrument Reference to support domain workflows.
Writes or updates Transaction during domain workflows.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Payment Channel Orchestration.

bricks.name: Access, Permit & LPR Control
bricks.description: Manages barrier access, permit validation, LPR flows, and access-event control across parking environments.

internalModules.title: Identity and Policy Engine
internalModules.description: Authenticates actors, evaluates access policies, and manages trust rules for Access, Permit & LPR Control.

internalModules.title: Entitlements and Lifecycle Management
internalModules.description: Manages roles, permissions, account state, and lifecycle changes within Access, Permit & LPR Control.

internalModules.title: Audit and Compliance Controls
internalModules.description: Records security-relevant actions and compliance evidence produced by Access, Permit & LPR Control.

interfaces.title: Authentication API
interfaces.description: Programmatic interface for authentication, authorization, or account checks exposed by Access, Permit & LPR Control.

interfaces.title: Administration Console
interfaces.description: Operational interface for managing identity settings and access policies in Access, Permit & LPR Control.

interfaces.title: Audit Event Stream
interfaces.description: Event interface that publishes security and compliance signals from Access, Permit & LPR Control.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Device & Validator Management to provide service capabilities required by Access, Permit & LPR Control.
Depends on Partner API, Sandbox & Certification to provide integration capabilities required by Access, Permit & LPR Control.
Depends on Operator Analytics & Control Tower to provide analytics capabilities required by Access, Permit & LPR Control.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Access, Permit & LPR Control integrates with an external identity provider for authentication and federation.
Access, Permit & LPR Control may call external screening or verification services to enforce trust and compliance checks.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Internal and external applications depend on Access, Permit & LPR Control for authentication, authorization, and trusted account state.
Governance and risk systems depend on Access, Permit & LPR Control to emit trust, access, and compliance events.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Identity Credential to support domain workflows.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Session Token.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Access Policy.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.

bricks.name: Reservations & Permit Inventory
bricks.description: Handles reservable inventory, recurring permits, visitor parking, and premium access products.

internalModules.title: Workflow and State Engine
internalModules.description: Orchestrates the main lifecycle, state transitions, and task flow handled by Reservations & Permit Inventory.

internalModules.title: Capacity and Exception Management
internalModules.description: Manages inventory, reservations, workload, and exception handling inside Reservations & Permit Inventory.

internalModules.title: Operations Console Logic
internalModules.description: Supports operator actions, escalations, and manual interventions required by Reservations & Permit Inventory.

interfaces.title: Workflow API
interfaces.description: API for starting, updating, or querying operational workflows managed by Reservations & Permit Inventory.

interfaces.title: Operator Console
interfaces.description: User interface for task handling, interventions, and operational control within Reservations & Permit Inventory.

interfaces.title: Lifecycle Status Events
interfaces.description: Event stream exposing state changes and exceptions produced by Reservations & Permit Inventory.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Parking Configuration & Policy Management to provide policy capabilities required by Reservations & Permit Inventory.
Depends on Access, Permit & LPR Control to provide identity capabilities required by Reservations & Permit Inventory.
Depends on Partner API, Sandbox & Certification to provide integration capabilities required by Reservations & Permit Inventory.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Reservations & Permit Inventory coordinates execution with external ERP, servicing, or operations platforms.
Reservations & Permit Inventory exchanges tasks, statuses, or escalations with customer and operations tooling.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Operational teams and services depend on Reservations & Permit Inventory to coordinate task flow, status, and exception handling.
Customer and partner-facing journeys depend on Reservations & Permit Inventory to advance fulfillment, servicing, or case progress.

dataDependencies.description: Reads Identity Credential to support domain workflows.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Session Token.
Acts as the primary owning brick for Access Policy.
Publishes events or audit records related to Audit Log.

bricks.name: Operator Analytics & Control Tower
bricks.description: Provides a unified operating view across occupancy, yield, compliance, channel mix, and incidents.

internalModules.title: Signal Ingestion and Processing
internalModules.description: Collects operational and business signals that feed Operator Analytics & Control Tower.

internalModules.title: Metrics and Decision Engine
internalModules.description: Calculates insights, KPIs, forecasts, or scores produced by Operator Analytics & Control Tower.

internalModules.title: Reporting and Operations Workspace
internalModules.description: Presents actionable views, alerts, and drill-down workflows for Operator Analytics & Control Tower.

interfaces.title: Dashboard Interface
interfaces.description: Interactive reporting or control surface that presents insights from Operator Analytics & Control Tower.

interfaces.title: Metrics and Query API
interfaces.description: API for retrieving metrics, scores, forecasts, or analytical outputs from Operator Analytics & Control Tower.

interfaces.title: Alert and Signal Feed
interfaces.description: Event or notification interface exposing operational signals generated by Operator Analytics & Control Tower.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on Partner API, Sandbox & Certification to provide integration capabilities required by Operator Analytics & Control Tower.
Depends on Reservations & Permit Inventory to provide operations capabilities required by Operator Analytics & Control Tower.
Depends on Device & Validator Management to provide service capabilities required by Operator Analytics & Control Tower.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Operator Analytics & Control Tower publishes metrics and operational signals into external analytical environments.
Operator Analytics & Control Tower depends on external alerting systems to escalate anomalies and operational issues.

externalSystemsDependingOnThisBrick.description: Operational teams depend on Operator Analytics & Control Tower to monitor health, detect issues, and make decisions.
Analytical and planning consumers depend on Operator Analytics & Control Tower for metrics, forecasts, and decision support outputs.

dataDependencies.description: Queries Dynamic Pricing Occupancy Optimization to support search, analytics, or decision flows.
Reads Payment Channel Orchestration to support domain workflows.
